name: Tenet Agendus
description: Drive the agenda with this massive impact hammer. Heavy attacks launch devastating energy disks.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Drive the agenda with this massive impact hammer. Heavy attacks launch devastating energy disks.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tenet Agendus’ shield appearing partially upside down when equipped with Baruuk.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where the Tenet Agendus hammer was not being held properly in a Warframe’s hand if it is the only weapon equipped.
Fixed an issue where the FX energy of the Tenet Agendus was not affected by custom color chosen.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Tenet Agendus having a Mastery Rank of 0. It is now the intended Mastery Rank 14, along the same line as the other Tenet Melee weapons available from Ergo Glast.
Fixed inability to see or hear the Tenet Agendus projectiles or explosions when other players use the heavy attack.
Fixed Tenet Agendus Shield Energy always being present when viewed in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Nora’s Choice: Update 30.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Tenet Agendus projectile only having correct visual/audio up until you let one expire from range.
Fixed the shield Energy FX of Tenet Agendus isn't affected by custom colour and lingers when shield Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Removed Headshot Damage bonus on the Tenet Agendus projectile.
